name: Curry Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and stir until well blended.
2. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container and store in the refrigerator.
To make soup:
3. Bring 10 cups of water to a boil in a large stockpot over high heat.
4. Add the curry soup mix to the boiling water and cover.
5. Reduce the heat to medium and stir occasionally.
6. Simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is tender.
7. Stir in 2 cups of shredded cooked chicken or cooked shrimp and cook until heated through.
8. Serve immediately.
